name: TCS34725 RGBC Color Sensor
description: TAOS/ams TCS34725 RGB+clear color sensor with IR blocking filter, I2C 0x29, 2.7-3.6V, clear DFN-6 2.0x2.4. The Adafruit color sensor (GY-33 boards). Pin 4 NC: do not connect.
dimensions_source: TAOS TCS3472 datasheet (TAOS135): FN package 2.0x2.4x0.65, contacts 0.3 pitch 0.65; Fig.11 suggested layout (pads 1.0x0.4, pitch 0.65, columns outer-to-outer 2.5 = centers 1.5 c-c). Pinout p.3.
